summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Case Competition feature. Fixed 2 bugs in backend (session collection name, datetime timezone handling). All 15 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified - admin panel shows Competitions section, candidate dashboard shows Case Competition nav when active competition exists, quiz flow works correctly.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/competitions.py - Fixed session collection name (sessions -> user_sessions), added ensure_utc helper for datetime comparisons, fixed user_id lookup for mock users
seed_data_creation: Created test competition 'FMS Fiesta Conquest' with 10 questions for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case Competition feature fully tested. Backend APIs: create/list/update/delete competitions, bulk add questions, start quiz, submit answers, submit quiz, get results, leaderboard. Frontend: Admin panel has Competitions section with Create Competition button and question management. Candidate dashboard shows Case Competition nav item when active competition exists. Quiz modal works with timer, progress bar, answer submission, skip functionality.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: competitions.py used 'sessions' collection but auth routes use 'user_sessions'
Comparing offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes caused TypeError
bugs_fixed.fix: Added ensure_utc() helper function to normalize all datetime comparisons

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Mock users have string IDs like 'mock-admin-1' which can't be converted to ObjectId
bugs_fixed.fix: Added try/except to handle both ObjectId and string user IDs

candidate_dashboard.competition_card: Displays with LIVE badge, timer, scoring info
candidate_dashboard.quiz_rules_display: Shows timer continues, cannot go back warnings
